title: Electricity Consumption Predictor
description: A high-fidelity ML dashboard built using JavaScript-based machine learning libraries, comparing Linear Regression and Decision Trees for load forecasting.

title: GoalForge – Discipline Builder
description: A modern productivity web application designed to help users build discipline and maintain focus.

title: SpendSmart – Expense Tracker
description: A modern expense tracking web application for managing daily spending.

title: Face Recognition Attendance System
description: An AI-powered attendance monitoring system using OpenCV and Python. It detects and recognizes faces in real-time, captures student images, trains face templates, and automatically marks attendance with timestamps.

title: XO Game – Tic Tac Toe
description: An interactive Tic Tac Toe game built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with a clean UI and smooth gameplay experience.
